title: wedelia macrorrhiza
intro: Wedelia macrorrhiza, also known as Long-stalked Wedelia or Kalanchoe, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Wedelia macrorrhiza include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Wedelia macrorrhiza include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
